subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My Glory! A servant present did lay before the Face a letter that bore thy name [3.5s]... ...In regard to his affairs, let him repeat nineteen times: Thou seest me, O my God, detached from all save Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی عبد حاضر مکتوبیکه بنام آنجناب بود تلقاء وجه عرض نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @suffering and imprisonment
